name: TenantForge
summary: Control plane for database-per-tenant SaaS on Neon: provision an isolated project per customer, route connections, orchestrate fleet-wide migrations, and manage tenant lifecycle (suspend/offboard/residency).

env.name: DATABASE_URL
env.description: Control-plane registry Postgres (tenant metadata only — not tenant data).

env.name: NEON_API_KEY
env.description: Neon API key used to provision/delete a project per tenant.

env.name: NEON_ORG_ID
env.description: Neon organization id (the account is org-scoped) for project operations.

env.name: NEON_API_BASE_URL
env.description: Override for the Neon API base URL (defaults to the public API).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND
env.description: Where per-tenant connection secrets live: neon-pg (default, AES-256-GCM in the control-plane DB) or vault (HashiCorp Vault KV v2).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_SECRET_KEY
env.description: Passphrase that encrypts per-tenant connection secrets at rest (AES-256-GCM); separate from DATABASE_URL's credential. Required when TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND=neon-pg.

env.name: VAULT_ADDR
env.description: HashiCorp Vault server URL (use TLS). Required when TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND=vault.

env.name: VAULT_TOKEN
env.description: HashiCorp Vault token. Required when TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND=vault.

env.name: VAULT_KV_MOUNT
env.description: Vault KV v2 mount path for the vault backend (default: secret).

env.name: VAULT_PATH_PREFIX
env.description: Path prefix under the Vault mount; secrets land at {prefix}/{tenantId} (default: tenantforge).

env.name: VAULT_NAMESPACE
env.description: Vault Enterprise namespace for the vault backend, if any.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_EXPORTER
env.description: Offboard export strategy: neon-archive (default, retain the project scaled-to-zero) or pg-dump (dump the tenant DB to an object store).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_EXPORT_DIR
env.description: Absolute directory for pg-dump artifacts (a durable mounted volume). Required when TENANTFORGE_EXPORTER=pg-dump.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_RETENTION_DAYS
env.description: Days an archived (offboarding) tenant is retained before purge-expired deletes it (default 30).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_ALLOWED_REGIONS
env.description: Comma-separated allow-list of regions tenants may be provisioned in (residency enforcement); empty = all known regions.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_AUTH_MODE
env.description: HTTP control-plane auth mode: token (default — static credentials) or oidc (verify a Bearer JWT against an external issuer's JWKS).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_HTTP_TOKEN
env.description: token mode: single-admin bearer-token shorthand for the HTTP control-plane API.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_HTTP_CREDENTIALS
env.description: token mode: per-operator HTTP credentials as comma-separated id:role:token entries (role = admin | readonly) — enables attribution + RBAC.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_OIDC_ISSUER
env.description: oidc mode (required): expected JWT issuer (iss).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_OIDC_AUDIENCE
env.description: oidc mode (required): expected JWT audience (aud).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_OIDC_JWKS_URI
env.description: oidc mode (required): the issuer's JWKS endpoint used to verify token signatures.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_OIDC_SUBJECT_CLAIM
env.description: oidc mode: JWT claim carrying the principal id (default sub).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_OIDC_ROLE_CLAIM
env.description: oidc mode: JWT claim carrying the role admin | readonly (default role).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_RATE_LIMIT
env.description: Max HTTP requests per principal per window (default 120).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_RATE_WINDOW_MS
env.description: HTTP rate-limit window length in ms (default 60000).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_RATE_LIMIT_STORE
env.description: Rate-limit counter store: memory (default, per-instance) or pg (shared across instances via the control-plane DB).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_CONNECTION_CACHE_TTL_MS
env.description: Cache getConnection resolutions for this many ms (0 = disabled). Process-local, tenant-keyed, invalidated on lifecycle changes.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_WEBHOOK_URL
env.description: Outbound lifecycle webhook endpoint (https). HMAC-signed POST of each control-plane event. Set together with TENANTFORGE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
env.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing key for outbound webhook payloads. Required when TENANTFORGE_WEBHOOK_URL is set.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_WEBHOOK_EVENTS
env.description: Comma-separated allow-list of event names to send to the webhook (empty = all events).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_BASE_URL
env.description: Base URL when calling the HTTP control-plane API.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_QUEUE_POLL_MS
env.description: Async lifecycle worker poll interval (ms) between drains of the Postgres-backed queue (default 5000).
